title: Mona Lisa
description: One of the most celebrated portraits in the history of art, renowned for its enigmatic expression and mastery of sfumato.

title: Girl with a Pearl Earring
description: A famous Tronie portrait known for its focal point — the oversized pearl earring and the subject's intimate, turning gaze.

title: Self-Portrait with Bandaged Ear
description: Painted following the incident where Van Gogh mutilated his own ear, this work displays his characteristic bold brushstrokes and emotional intensity.

title: Lady in the Moonlight
description: A masterpiece by the legendary Indian artist, blending European academic realism with Indian sensibilities and mythological themes.
